```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|49049000&_include=Condition:patient

```

### Explanation:

| Query | Code | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `snomed.info/sct\|49049000` | SNOMED CT | Parkinson's disease (primary) |
| `icd-10-cm\|G20` | ICD-10-CM | Parkinson's disease |

### Notes:

```
# Path A — Condition: Parkinson's Disease (SNOMED CT 49049000)
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|49049000&clinical-status=http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical|active&_include=Condition:subject

# Path C — MedicationRequest: Levodopa (RxNorm 66623, ingredient-level)
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|66623&status=active&_include=MedicationRequest:subject
```

---

### Design Notes

#### Path A — Formal Diagnosis
| Parameter | Value | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| `code` | `http://snomed.info/sct\|49049000` | SNOMED CT canonical code for *Parkinson's disease (disorder)* |
| `clinical-status` | `active` | Excludes resolved/historical entries; keeps confirmed active diagnoses |
| `_include` | `Condition:subject` | Pulls referenced `Patient` resources in the same bundle for downstream union |

#### Path C — Medication Proxy
| Parameter | Value | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| `code` | `http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm\|66623` | RxNorm **ingredient-level** code for levodopa; will match carbidopa-levodopa combos (Sinemet, Rytary) and levodopa monotherapy if servers support ingredient rollup |
| `status` | `active` | Limits to current prescriptions; drop or broaden (e.g., `active,completed`) if historical exposure is needed |
| `_include` | `MedicationRequest:subject` | Same patient resolution strategy as Path A |

---

### Union Strategy & Population Interpretation

```
PD Cohort = Path_A_patients ∪ Path_C_patients

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Path A only         │  Intersection      │  Path C only │
│  (Dx, no levodopa)   │  (Dx + levodopa)   │  (levodopa,  │
│  e.g., early-stage   │  classic PD        │  no PD Dx)   │
│  or non-pharm mgmt   │  patients          │  ← Cross-    │
│                      │                    │    indication │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Path C–only patients** (levodopa without a PD diagnosis) represent your cross-indication population and may include:
- Atypical parkinsonism (MSA, PSP, DLB — not coded as PD)
- Restless legs syndrome (off-label levodopa challenge)
- Drug-induced parkinsonism under empirical trial
- Delayed/incomplete diagnostic coding

> **Tip:** If your FHIR server does **not** support ingredient-level rollup for `MedicationRequest.code`, supplement with a `Medication?ingredient.item.concept=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|66623` search and then chain back via `MedicationRequest?medication.ingredient.item.concept=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|66623`.

### Code Selection Rationale

| 24611000 | Multiple system atrophy | ❌ Atypical parkinsonian syndrome |
| 37340000 | Corticobasal degeneration | ❌ Atypical parkinsonian syndrome |

### Why `:below` (Subsumption) is Appropriate Here

Using the FHIR `:below` modifier captures **intra-concept subtypes of idiopathic PD** that are still clinically and taxonomically within the Parkinson's disease branch:

### Clinical & Coding Notes

- **RxNorm `66603`** is the **ingredient-level concept** for levodopa; FHIR systems with RxNorm hierarchy traversal will resolve this to all clinical drug products containing levodopa (e.g., Sinemet®, Rytary®, Duopa®, Stalevo®)

- **Cross-indication noise**: ~5–10% of returned patients may have restless legs syndrome (RLS) or atypical parkinsonism (MSA, PSP, CBD) — cross-reference with `Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|49049000` (Parkinson's disease) for cohort refinement
